options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -add_simulation
options.description: Add simulation for design coverage

options.name: -adjust_input_activity_in_iterations
options.description: Adjust input activity in state propagation.

options.name: -adjust_macro_activity_in_iterations
options.description: Adjust macro activity in state propagation.

options.name: -annotation_detail_report
options.description: Generate detailed annotation report showing objects in their specific type blocks.

options.name: -auto_twf_delay_annotation
options.description: Auto detect zero delay vectors

options.name: -average_rise_fall_cap
options.description: When set to true, the software uses the average of rise and fall capacitance from the liberty file.

options.name: -binary_db_name
options.description: Specifies the name of the binary power database file ( filename.db ).

options.name: -block_independent_peakpower
options.description: Power profiling done independently for each vector, design block

options.name: -boundary_gate_leakage_file
options.description: liberty side file required for boundary gate leakage calculation

options.name: -boundary_gate_leakage_report
options.description: generate verbose report for boundary gate leakage calculation

options.name: -boundary_leakage_cell_property_file
options.description: Cell properties file for boundary leakage flow

options.name: -boundary_leakage_edge_annotation_file
options.description: read edge annotation summary file for boundary gate leakage flow

options.name: -boundary_leakage_multi_pgpin_support
options.description: Support for computing boundary leakage power for cells with multiple pg-pins by selecting the pg-pin connected to M0 rail

options.name: -boundary_leakage_pessimism_removal
options.description: Support for S-FCs-S pessimism removal feature in boundary leakage calculation

options.name: -boundary_leakage_PXE_support
options.description: Support for PXE feature in boundary leakage calculation

options.name: -bulk_pins
options.description: Defines power and ground bulk LEF pins for the design.

options.name: -capacity
options.description: Specifies the segment count for profiler

options.name: -case_insensitive_mapping
options.description: Case insensitive auto-mapping, ignoring the case(upper or lower) of a character while matching rtl with design names.

options.name: -clock_source_as_clock
options.description: Specifies to use the correct clock frequency for activity calculation.

options.name: -comprehensive_automapping
options.description: Comprehensively perform instance name mapping between the RTL netlist and GATE level netlist.

options.name: -constant_override
options.description: Specifies to give higher precedence to propagated constants defined using the set_case_analysis command.

options.name: -corner
options.description: Defines the library corner (for non-MMMC setup).

options.name: -create_binary_db
options.description: A value of true creates a binary database of power results.

options.name: -create_driver_db
options.description: Specifies to determine all the drivers/receivers on the ground net.

options.name: -create_gui_db
options.description: A value of true creates a binary database of power results for gui.

options.name: -current_generation_method
options.description: choose avg or peak current generation method

options.name: -decap_cell_list
options.description: Specifies the physical only cells, such as decap cells, to include in the power report.

options.name: -default_frequency
options.description: Specifies to set the default frequency in the MHz unit for net not annotated by TWF.

options.name: -default_slew
options.description: Specifies to set the default slew in the ns unit for net not annotated by TWF.

options.name: -default_supply_voltage
options.description: Specifies to set a default voltage for power nets in a scenario where the power engine cannot determine the voltage of these nets.

options.name: -detailed_view_current_only
options.description: Ignore switching current for instances with detailed view

options.name: -disable_clock_gate_clipping
options.description: Specifies to enable clock gate output clipping so that the output transition density of an ICG cell does not exceed the input clock pin transition density.

options.name: -disable_leakage_scaling
options.description: Specifies to exclude leakage power during scaling factor computation when target power is specified using the set_power command.

options.name: -disable_static
options.description: When set to true in the dynamic vector-based or dynamic vectorless flows, the command performs only dynamic analysis and turns-off static power calculation.

options.name: -distribute_switching_power
options.description: distribute switching power to all connected I/O instances if the net does not have a driver instance

options.name: -distributed_combine_report_format
options.description: control which power report files need to be combined

options.name: -distributed_setup
options.description: Specifies a file containing the customized setup details for running power analysis in the distributed mode.

options.name: -domain_based_clipping
options.description: Determines the frequency to be used to clip propagated activity that is too high.

options.name: -dynamic_glitch_filter
options.description: set absolute time threshold value (in ns) for dynamic glitch filter

options.name: -dynamic_scale_clock_by_frequency
options.description: set clock frequency scaling ratio by frenquency value

options.name: -dynamic_scale_clock_by_name
options.description: set clock frequency scaling ratio by clock name

options.name: -dynamic_vectorless_ranking_methods
options.description: choose ranking options from: load, slack, clock and vector_activity

options.name: -enable_auto_mapping
options.description: Specifies to automatically perform instance name mapping between the RTL netlist and GATE level netlist.

options.name: -enable_auto_queue
options.description: Automatically assign power job to proper queue

options.name: -enable_disk_mapping
options.description: Enable disk caching of toggles.

options.name: -enable_duty_prop_with_global
options.description: Specifies to propagate duty cycle with the global switching activity setting for all data nets in the dynamic vectorless analysis flow.

options.name: -enable_dynamic_current_slew_load_interpolation
options.description: enable dynamic current slew load interpolation

options.name: -enable_dynamic_scaling
options.description: Enables set_power scaling for dynamic power analysis.

options.name: -enable_flop_state_propagation
options.description: Enable flop state propagation

options.name: -enable_force_propagation
options.description: Enable force propagation

options.name: -enable_generated_clock
options.description: Specifies to get generated clock frequency during activity propagation for static power analysis.

options.name: -enable_input_net_power
options.description: Specifies to calculate the switching power of input nets.

options.name: -enable_interactive_reports
options.description: Enable voltus interactive reports

options.name: -enable_mt_in_vectorbasedflow
options.description: Specifies to enable multi-threading for the VCD/FSDB based dynamic vector-based flows.

options.name: -enable_mt_reports
options.description: to enable multithreaded power report generation

options.name: -enable_mt_state_propagation
options.description: Enable Multithreading in state propagation

options.name: -enable_pba_for_tempus_pi
options.description: ensure path based timing analysis in tempus-pi flow.

options.name: -enable_power_target_flow
options.description: enable vectorless state propagation with power target

options.name: -enable_rtl_vectorbased_dynamic_analysis
options.description: Specifies to take an RTL or partial VCD/FSDB file as input and use that for dynamic vector-based flow.

options.name: -enable_scan_report
options.description: enable scan report automatical generation

options.name: -enable_single_cycle_scheduling
options.description: Stage-propagation based vectorless flow schedules new flops/macros every cycle to achieve faster toggle coverage.

options.name: -enable_slew_based_ccs_pin_cap
options.description: honor ccs pin cap

options.name: -enable_stable_clock_gating
options.description: Use stable clock gate in vless flow

options.name: -enable_stable_flop_scheduling
options.description: Enable stable flop scheduling

options.name: -enable_state_propagation
options.description: enable vectorless state propagation dynamic analysis

options.name: -enable_tempus_pi
options.description: enable timing critical path analysis in state propagation based vectorless flow.

options.name: -enable_xp
options.description: standalone power analysis in voltus-XP

options.name: -enhanced_blackbox_avg
options.description: Specifies to use the average toggle rate of related inputs for enhanced blackbox propagation.

options.name: -enhanced_blackbox_max
options.description: Specifies to use the maximum toggle rate of related inputs for enhanced blackbox propagation.

options.name: -equivalent_annotation
options.description: Enable Qbar annotation

options.name: -event_based_leakage_power
options.description: Event based leakage power

options.name: -external_load_config_file
options.description: Allow user to provide external load file to set external load manually.

options.name: -extraction_tech_file
options.description: technology file for exaction

options.name: -extractor_include
options.description: extraction include file

options.name: -fanout_limit
options.description: Specifies the fanout limit for nets.

options.name: -flatten_xpgv_block_instances
options.description: Identify text file containing name of block instances which need to use DEF while already having PGV

options.name: -force_library_merging
options.description: force library merging even if there is some error during merging

options.name: -from_x_transition_factor
options.description: activity count for x to 0/1 transition

options.name: -from_z_transition_factor
options.description: activity count for z to 0/1 transition

options.name: -generate_activity_mapping_report
options.description: turn on/off generation of activity_mapping.rpt

options.name: -generate_current_for_rail
options.description: Generates current files for the specified rail.

options.name: -generate_flop_ranking_data
options.description: Specifies the name of the dir containing the ranking data.

options.name: -generate_leakage_power_map_based_on_calculated_leakage
options.description: Print leakage power table based on calculated leakage power.

options.name: -generate_static_report_from_state_propagation
options.description: generate static report from state propagation flow

options.name: -handle_glitch
options.description: A transition is defined as a glitch when the time difference between two sequential toggles are less than half of the rise transition time + fall transition time in the vector-based static power calculation.

options.name: -handle_transport_glitch
options.description: Enable transport glitch support

options.name: -handle_tri_state
options.description: When set to true , all tristate device enable pin values will be taken into account when determining the propagation of the activity through tristate gates.

options.name: -hier_delimiter
options.description: Specifies the hierarchical delimiter in the DEF file. The default hierarchical delimiter is a forward slash ( / ) but can be changed by setting the -hier_delimiter parameter.

options.name: -honor_combinational_logic_on_clock_net
options.description: Specifies the behavior of combination logic on clock net.

options.name: -honor_negative_energy
options.description: A value of true specifies that Voltus will keep negative internal energy numbers from the .lib internal power table.

options.name: -honor_net_activity
options.description: honor net activity from activity file

options.name: -honor_non_mission_leakage
options.description: Option to activate Non-Mission leakage flow

options.name: -hybrid_analysis
options.description: Vbased + Vless runs done separately and results combined

options.name: -ignore_control_signals
options.description: A value of true specifies that control signals will be ignored when propagating activity.

options.name: -ignore_end_toggles_in_profile
options.description: ignore toggles on end boundary in profiler analysis

options.name: -ignore_glitches_at_same_time_stamp
options.description: Specifies to ignore glitches at the same transient time in the vector-based static and dynamic power analysis flow.

options.name: -ignore_inout_pin_cap
options.description: When set to true , ignores the bidirectional pin capacitances ( direction : inout ) defined for I/O cells in the .lib file, when calculating switching power and internal power.

options.name: -ignore_macro_leakage_scale_for_temp
options.description: Option for ignoring leakage power scaling on macro cell

options.name: -include_seq_clockpin_power
options.description: Reports the clock pin power of flip-flops as part of the clock network power.

options.name: -include_timing_in_current_file
options.description: enable timing bit writing in current file

options.name: -ir_derated_timing_view
options.description: set timing view in tempus-pi flow.

options.name: -keep_clock_gate_ratio_in_iterations
options.description: Keep clock gate ratio in state propagation.

options.name: -leakage_scale_factor_for_temp
options.description: Performs a linear scaling of the leakage power for temperature in all libraries.

options.name: -library_preference
options.description: option to choose instance binding to closest voltage or ecsm/ccsp library.

options.name: -macro_pgv_leakage
options.description: Use PG pin based leakage current from PGV instead of from liberty.

options.name: -macro_toggle_pin_percentage
options.description: Set percentage of the number of Macro bits to schedule

options.name: -mbff_toggle_behavior
options.description: select mbff toggle: simultaneous | independent(default) | sbff | pin_percentage during vectorless state propagation dynamic analysis

options.name: -mbff_toggle_pin_percentage
options.description: The percentage of MBFF bits to schedule

options.name: -memory_current_scaling_method
options.description: NLPM Current Scaling Method for Memories [1/2/3]

options.name: -merge_switched_net_currents
options.description: Specifies to merge switched net currents into always-on currents.

options.name: -method
options.description: Specifies the type of analysis to be performed.

options.name: -min_leaf_count
options.description: min number of leaf instances count

options.name: -multi_scenario_simulation
options.description: Enable multi-scenario simulation

options.name: -off_pg_bulk_leakage
options.description: Contribute the bulk pin leakage to the connected always on rail and zero leakage to the off rail

options.name: -off_pg_nets
options.description: The name of the power rails that will be turned off.

options.name: -output_current_data_prefix
options.description: Specifies a prefix to the static or dynamic current files generated by the software.

options.name: -partition_count
options.description: Number of physical partitions for distributed run.

options.name: -partition_twf
options.description: turn on/off twf partitioning in distributed flow

options.name: -pin_based_twf
options.description: turn on/off generation of pin based TWF in dynamic method

options.name: -power_grid_library
options.description: Specifies the name of the Cadence power cell libraries ( .cl ).

options.name: -power_include_initial_x_transitions
options.description: Controls how the initial X state toggle should be counted.

options.name: -power_match_state_for_logic_x
options.description: Controls how the logic X will be evaluated in the boolean function of the 'when' state of a power table.

options.name: -pre_simulation_empty_period
options.description: Set pre-simulation empty period for power analysis

options.name: -pre_simulation_period
options.description: Set pre-simulation period for power analysis

options.name: -pre_simulation_power_exclude_period
options.description: To specify pre simulation power exclude duration

options.name: -precision
options.description: Specifies precision of decimal range [1-8] to ensure consistent decimal places are displayed for each power component.

options.name: -quit_on_activity_coverage_threshold
options.description: Specifies the activity (VCD/FSDB/TCF) coverage threshold value.

options.name: -read_rcdb
options.description: Specifies to write a SPEF file containing only the total C for signal nets and pass it to the Dynamic Power engine.

options.name: -relax_arc_match
options.description: Fallback arc lookup when no exact match

options.name: -report_black_boxes
options.description: Specify this parameter to report cells that are used as black boxes.

options.name: -report_clock_instance_switching_info
options.description: Generate a report for clock instance switched during state propagation

options.name: -report_idle_instances
options.description: report non-switching instances in vectorless state propagation dynamic analysis

options.name: -report_instance_switching_info
options.description: all or output_logic or none

options.name: -report_instance_switching_list
options.description: specify file which is having list of instances

options.name: -report_library_usage
options.description: generate report for lib usage

options.name: -report_missing_bulk_connectivity
options.description: Specifies to report missing bulk pins in the missing input report ( -report_missing_input ).

options.name: -report_missing_input
options.description: Specifies to report missing netlist information in input files, such as library, LEF/DEF, PGV, SPEF, TWF, and missing logical connectivity for cell instance (PGNET).

options.name: -report_missing_nets
options.description: Controls reporting of missing nets in both static and dynamic power analysis.

options.name: -report_scan_chain_stats
options.description: report scan chain analysis statistics

options.name: -report_stat
options.description: Reports a set of statistics on the instance power, instance power density, clock power, or transition density.

options.name: -report_time_display_fraction_digits
options.description: specify display fraction digits of reporting time

options.name: -report_twf_attributes
options.description: TWF attributes report format

options.name: -reuse_flop_ranking_data
options.description: Specifies the name of the dir containing the ranking data.

options.name: -reuse_flop_ranking_data_hier
options.description: A hierarchy name from the user that will be used to search the ranking data for the block level being analyzed.

options.name: -save_bbox
options.description: save the instance bbox to a text file when output power db

options.name: -scale_to_sdc_clock_frequency
options.description: Specifies to enable the VCD clock frequency to be scaled up to the SDC clock frequency.

options.name: -scan_chain_activity
options.description: define scan chain name and activity

options.name: -scan_chain_name
options.description: define scan chain name and pattern

options.name: -scan_control_file
options.description: Specifies the scan control file name required to run the Scan Mode Analysis flow.

options.name: -scan_mbff_chain_type
options.description: Specifies the type of multi-bit scan flip-flop.

options.name: -set_power_event_based
options.description: Constrained power analysis in event based power

options.name: -settling_buffer
options.description: Specifies the settling buffer time (in ps unit) between multiple windows of a VCD file.

options.name: -show_cell_usage_stats
options.description: show cell usage stats in power report

options.name: -smart_window
options.description: Max power metric window extraction

options.name: -split_bus_power
options.description: A value of false applies the internal power number to each individual bit.

options.name: -start_time_alignment
options.description: Specifies to align all the signals of the activity file at time zero.

options.name: -state_dependent_leakage
options.description: When set to false , power analysis performs state independent leakage power calculation.

options.name: -stateprop_ignore_unannot_pins
options.description: Enable ignore unannotated pins in state propagation

options.name: -static_multi_mode_scenario_file
options.description: set static multi-mode scenario file name

options.name: -static_netlist
options.description: Specifies to perform static power analysis using a Verilog or DEF only neltist.

options.name: -switching_power_on_rise_only
options.description: Switching power analysis done only for rise toggles

options.name: -thermal_input_file
options.description: Specifies to read a power map file to perform thermal analysis.

options.name: -thermal_leakage_temperature_scale_table_file
options.description: Defines library/cell/instance based leakage power scaling factors on each temperature point.

options.name: -to_x_transition_factor
options.description: activity count for 0/1 to x transition

options.name: -to_z_transition_factor
options.description: activity count for 0/1 to z transition

options.name: -transition_factor_based_duty
options.description: Duty calculation using transition factor of toggle

options.name: -transition_time_method
options.description: Specifies the minimum, maximum, or average transition time method that will be used with the integrated timer or the external TWF.

options.name: -twf_delay_annotation
options.description: Allows you to choose between min, max, or avg arrival times from the timing window file (TWF).

options.name: -twf_load_cap
options.description: Allows you to ignore or to select minimum, maximum, or average value of TWF external load or capacitance for power calculation.

options.name: -unified_power_switch_flow
options.description: if enable ups flow

options.name: -use_cell_leakage_power_density
options.description: Specifies to use library leakage density times area (default_leakage_power_density).

options.name: -use_fastest_clock_for_dynamic_scheduling
options.description: Specifies to use only the respective fastest clock associated with each net or pin to schedule events for a given simulation period.

options.name: -use_lef_for_missing_cells
options.description: Allows a combination of LEF and PGV in the dynamic analysis flow.

options.name: -use_only_ddv_current
options.description: use only DDV current from PGV

options.name: -use_physical_partition
options.description: use geometric partition in DP

options.name: -use_twf_stable_randomized_arrival_delay
options.description: Allows tool to choose among all, data_only and none for stable randomized delay annotation from timing window file.

options.name: -use_zero_delay_vector_file
options.description: Enables zero delay mode in vector-based dynamic analysis to avoid pessimism in current estimation.

options.name: -vector_profile_mode
options.description: activity or density

options.name: -worst_case_vector_activity
options.description: Specifies to use the worst activity value when multiple vectors are specified in the static power calculation flow.

options.name: -worst_step_size
options.description: Set worst step size for power analysis

options.name: -worst_window_count
options.description: Set worst window count for power analysis

options.name: -worst_window_coverage
options.description: Set worst window coverage type

options.name: -worst_window_reports
options.description: generate Power reports for full simuation and worst power window

options.name: -worst_window_size
options.description: Set worst window size for power analysis

options.name: -worst_window_type
options.description: Set worst window type for power analysis

options.name: -write_boundary_leakage_edge_annotation
options.description: write edge annotation summary for boundary gate leakage flow

options.name: -write_default_uti
options.description: For instances that are not hooked to any power/ground rail, the current for these instances are reflected in the default static current files.

options.name: -write_dynamic_currents
options.description: Current write with method event_based

options.name: -write_profiling_db
options.description: turn on/off profiling database writing

options.name: -write_simulation_db
options.description: Save functional waveform foreach instance when parsing FSDB/VCD

options.name: -write_static_currents
options.description: A value of true tells Voltus to generate the current data files per net.

options.name: -x_count_transition_using_3_states
options.description: Toggle count using 3 states in VCD

options.name: -x_transition_factor
options.description: When using VCD/FSDB one can specify how transitions to and from X are counted.

options.name: -z_transition_factor
options.description: When using VCD/FSDB one can specify how transitions to and from Z are counted.

options.name: -zero_delay_vector_toggle_shift
options.description: Specifies to shift the current waveform in the zero-delay VCD flow.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
